_note: Provisional epigram set — Anthony's real lines, pulled from Thymer (Gratitude, Found Sensory, Natural Observations) on 2026-07-03. This proves the mechanism with your own voice. YOU curate the true set; intimate / name-bearing lines were deliberately left out for you to add by choice.
lines: Making and encountering moments of meaning
The rhizomatic construction of non-native grasses must help them be as hardy as they are
Last night, I heard meowing type sounds outside the window, around 2:45 AM
A very sociable, and I figure returning Catbird family is very talkative in the morning
